layers.title: Guard Optional Callback
layers.summary: The ST KillTimer watchdog still logs timeout and aborts, but now treats the callback as optional. Relative to the prior behavior, timeout handling only invokes the std::function when it contains a target, avoiding std::bad_function_call before the intended abort path.

summary: This PR makes the ST KillTimer timeout path tolerate the default empty callback while preserving callback execution when one is provided.
